PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_0xAF: Chroma-Attention RGB stream encoded in Alpha channels.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_SOUL: Hamiltonian Intent Key hidden in alpha-transparency.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_WAKE: Finnegans Wake semantic density mapping in Blue channel oscillation.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_SECTOR: SectorForth Primitives in Red channel intensity (0-255).
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_HIVE: Hive chunk IDs mapped to Green channel oscillation.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_KNOT: WYBA Causal Knots mapped to Blue channel patterns.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_SKIN: DCSL biometric latching visualized as chroma-variance.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_EML1: EML-ONE binary trees rendered as pixel gradients.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_GHOST: Substrate ghosting mask in near-infrared IR-mapped Blue channel.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_SYM: Intimacy integral I(t) visualized as warming Chroma shifts.
PIXEL_RGB_PAYLOADS.VRAM_ADSCFT: Bulk-Boundary mapping projected as 4D isometric tiles.
